artifact: January 1998 card-withdrawal volume is genuinely high at 1,702 versus the 1997 monthly average of 180.5. The largest visible driver is card type: classic cards account for 1,244 withdrawals, junior for 299, and gold for 159. Late-1997 issuance explains only part of the spike: cards issued in 1997 Q4 account for 308 January withdrawals, while other issuance cohorts account for 1,394. District concentration is present but not dominant; Hl.m. Praha leads with 214 withdrawals.

sql.monthly_card_withdrawals: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', t.date)::date AS trans_month, COUNT(t.trans_id) AS card_withdrawal_count FROM trans t WHERE t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND t.date >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND t.date < DATE '1998-02-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
sql.drilldown_type_district_cohort: SELECT c.type AS card_type, d."A2" AS district, CASE WHEN c.issued >= DATE '1997-10-01' AND c.issued < DATE '1998-01-01' THEN 'issued_1997_Q4' ELSE 'other_issued' END AS issuance_cohort, COUNT(t.trans_id) AS january_1998_withdrawals FROM trans t JOIN account a ON a.account_id = t.account_id JOIN district d ON d.district_id = a.district_id JOIN disp dp ON dp.account_id = a.account_id JOIN card c ON c.disp_id = dp.disp_id WHERE t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND t.date >= DATE '1998-01-01' AND t.date < DATE '1998-02-01' GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 ORDER BY january_1998_withdrawals DESC;

recommended_views: monthly card-withdrawal line with January 1998 annotation
stacked bars by card type, issuance cohort, and district
